results.title: Conference examines Pak foreign policy amid shifting global geopolitical landscape
results.description: ISLAMABAD - The Institute of Strategic Studies Islamabad (ISSI), in collaboration with the Friedrich Ebert Stiftung (FES) Pakistan, yesterday hosted an international conference examining Pakistan’s strategic outlook amid rapidly evolving regional and global geopolitical dynamics, with experts highlighting the country’s.

results.title: Senate appointment shows Carney’s knack for strategy
results.description: Mark Carney may still be relatively new to elected politics, but he’s proving to be a remarkably quick study in the art of political chess.

results.title: PM Modi extends wishes on Jagannath Rath Yatra, calls it 'radiant expression' of India's spiritual heritage
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extends his warm wishes on the auspicious occasion of the 2026 Rath Yatra. Discover the significance of this grand spiritual event as lakhs of devotees gather in Puri and Ahmedabad to seek blessings.

results.title: Minority NPP stages walkout over SIM re-registration Parliamentary oversight
results.description: Minority Caucus in Parliament on Wednesday, July 15, staged a walkout in protest against the First Deputy Speaker Benard Ahiafor, accusing him of using parliamentary rules to stampede oversight on the planned SIM re-registration exercise. Minority Leader Alexander Afenyo-Markin, asked a supplementary question, inquiring from Samuel Nartey George, the Minister of Communication, Digital Technology and [...]

results.title: Bid to poach MLAs is against democracy: VCK chief Thol Thirumavalavan
results.description: He said allegations had been raised that legislators were being “bought” across parties and pointed to complaints by two TVK MLAs claiming attempts were made to lure them.
